channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: St Julian's rd, 6th May
item.description:
Spillage on street from bin collection
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Julians Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped, 6th May
item.description:
Outside 181 Marmadon Road, chair and cabinet both dismantled. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th May
item.description:
Bags and rubbish donations
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 6th May
item.description:
Why hasn’t the council collected it this morning?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Illegal Parking problem has been found, 6th May
item.description:
Incorrect Vehicle parked in personalised disabled bay outside 20 Brooklime House
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherds Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Site says this is fixed on Tuesday, 6th May
item.description:
It’s Wednesday and it’s still here. Reported it on Monday. Site says status changed to fixed on Tuesday afternoon. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees in Kingsley Mews causing mess and dieting cars and properties in Camden Grove, 6th May
item.description:
The trees next to the wall bordering Camden Grove constantly drop leaves and pollen onto the street, cars and properties causing significant inconvenience and cost to clear up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Grove, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish pile is growing, 6th May
item.description:
I have reported fly tipping in our mews and have received no feedback from Hackney Council. The tipping has grown from a sofa chair to now several other items as well as some rubbish bags. Please can we get this cleared up, thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Mill Lane apartments, pavement on the left hand side of the road if you're looking towards Shoot Up Hill, 6th May
item.description:
There are a few wonky paving slabs which caused me to trip and injure myself while running
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-18, Mill Lane, Kilburn, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass bottle on pavement, 6th May
item.description:
Broken glass bottle on pavement by cs1 and corner of butterfield green

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottles amd Litter, 6th May
item.description:
This the 4th request. This issue has not been resolved as my previous report had been marked as resolved. Bottles and litter been here for MONTHS. Reported several times but seems no action as no organisation wants to take responsibility. Grass has been cut and this is just left. No photos as driving and not safe to stop. This is now the 4th time I am reporting this. If you can cut the grass, clear the litter! This is not an area that would be safe for any volunteer litterpickers either. So should have been done when the grass was done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163,165, Woodside Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public litter on the road, 6th May
item.description:
The street needs to be swept and there is a lot of litter on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large concrete garden ornament, 6th May
item.description:
A large concrete garden ornament has been broken up and is on the footway by the steps from basing Drive to Arbuthnot lane flyover please can this be removed as very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basing Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Completely blocked gulley, 6th May
item.description:
Blocked gulley on a hill. Has been pretty blocked for months but then there was a huge Thames water leak last week and all of the sand and gravel from under the slabs washed into the drain. Thames water have said it is not their problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: KFC dump surplus stock in the street, 6th May
item.description:
The Welling Branch of KFC routinely dumps bags of surplus chicken in the street. Not only is this wrong, it encourages foxes to turn up. KFC should follow the correct rules on business waste . I have pictures of this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchfield Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clean up, 6th May
item.description:
The area is full of trash, please clean up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Artificial grass dumped, 6th May
item.description:
Someone has decided to dump some artificial grass on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herbert Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 6th May
item.description:
Huge pothole been here for a very long time. Super dangerous for cyclists as it's very hard to spot, especially due to low lighting at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Passage, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 6th May
item.description:
There is litter all over the footway too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utilities cover to cables, botched previous repair, 6th May
item.description:
On dropped kerb pedestrian/wheelchair crossing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
